title: KeepInvTag
description: A simple Mod/Datapack where only people with the 'keepinv' tag keep the items.
body:
With the Mod/Datapack you can give players a tag with which they can keep the items after death.

If you find any bugs or have any datapack suggestions, please let me know on my [Discord](https://discord.gg/fy4KuxYKVD).

## Notes
- All items will be dropped on **one** spot
- **XP** is reset by default unless you change it

## Mods
- If you use Fabric you must have a version of [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) also installed
- If you use Quilt you must have a version of [Quilted Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) also installed

You can tag players with

```
/tag [PlayerName] add KeepInv
```
and remove it with

```
/tag [PlayerName] remove KeepInv
```

## V1.0.3
In Version 1.0.3 or higher, you can set whether you keep the XP or it is completely reset

Reset XP (by default)

```
/scoreboard players set xp keepinvtag 1
```
Keep XP (for everyone)

```
/scoreboard players set xp keepinvtag 0
```

### Thanks
